title: Desktop Robot Assistant with Voice-Controlled Manipulation
description: A voice-controlled desktop robot assistant system that performs manipulation tasks like desk cleaning and organization through natural language commands. The system coordinates multiple operators including PID-based motion control, trained ACT policies for pick-and-place operations, and MolmoAct2 VLA for generalized manipulation. The architecture demonstrates distributed robotics with the voice agent, policies, slider control, and VLA running on separate machines connected via LiveKit Portal.
